attachments.fallback: How to Merge PST Files Without Duplicates? - @WillieScott
attachments.text: Use Mailvita Merge PST for Mac Tool to merge PST file without duplicate. Simple solution is for every who wnats to join Outlook PST file. Support Windows OS and MS Outlook Versions.
